skills.title: Scaffold Kickoff

skills.title: Skill Provenance

skills.title: Skill Lifecycle Management

skills.title: Plan Review

skills.title: Steelman

skills.title: Red-Team Challenge
skills.purpose: Actively looks for weak points, exploitation paths, unsafe assumptions, and failure cases in a design or plan.

skills.title: Premortem
skills.purpose: Assumes the project failed and works backward to identify the most likely causes before work starts.

skills.title: Assumptions Audit
skills.purpose: Extracts unstated assumptions from a plan, brief, architecture, or ticket and marks which ones are dangerous.

skills.title: Contradiction Finder

skills.title: Scope Pressure Test

skills.title: Decision Packet Builder

skills.title: Tradeoff Analysis
skills.purpose: Compares competing options across cost, complexity, flexibility, risk, and maintenance burden.

skills.title: Architecture Review
skills.purpose: Evaluates whether the system shape, boundaries, dependencies, and responsibilities actually make sense.

skills.title: Drift Detection

skills.title: Blocker Extraction

skills.title: Acceptance Criteria Hardening
skills.purpose: Turns vague success language into observable, testable, decision-complete acceptance criteria.

skills.title: Gap Analysis
skills.purpose: Compares current repo or plan state against target state and lists missing pieces cleanly.

skills.title: Skeptic Pass
skills.purpose: Runs a deliberately doubtful review over a proposal to catch optimism bias and hand-wavy claims.

skills.title: Failure Mode Analysis

skills.title: Root Cause Analysis
skills.purpose: Investigates why a bug, outage, or process failure happened and what underlying cause actually mattered.

skills.title: Reverse Brainstorming

skills.title: Agent Orchestration

skills.title: Delegation Boundaries

skills.title: Approval Gates
